channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Man United draws 1-1 at Real Sociedad in Europa League and Tottenham loses to AZ Alkmaar
item.description: Manchester United settled for a 1-1 draw with Real Sociedad in the first leg of the Europa League round of 16 on Thursday. United led on Joshua Zirkzee's goal in the 58th minute but the hosts equalized 12 minutes later after Bruno Fernandes' hand ball.
item.dc:creator: KAREL JANICEK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At the bobsled and skeleton world championships, some moms might make their way to the podium
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — The latest addition to the list of amenities available to athletes at the bobsled and skeleton world championships is a room inside a lodge just down the hill from the finish line.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jaguars agree to trade receiver Christian Kirk to the Texans for a 2026 pick, AP source says
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars found a trade partner — a division rival, no less — for receiver Christian Kirk before officially releasing him.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Travis Kelce calls out Eagles for loopholes in Saquon Barkley's new contract
item.description: Travis Kelce spoke out against the incentives in Saquon Barkley's new contract during an episode of the tight end's podcast, disagreeing with them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pat McAfee shares message wishing death on himself, infant daughter following Canada comments
item.description: Pat McAfee shared messages that wished death upon himself and his daughter for speaking out against Canada following boos at a WWE event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Devils get Dumoulin, Panthers add Sturm and Golden Knights reacquire Smith as NHL trades pile up
item.description: The banged up New Jersey Devils wasted no time filling an area of need ahead of the NHL trade deadline, the defending champion Florida Panthers made an under-the-radar move that could pave the way for another deep playoff run, and the Vegas Golden Knights brought back a member of their recent Stanle
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles' Brandon Graham re-tore triceps in Super Bowl win over Chiefs: report
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles defensive end Brandon Graham re-tore his triceps in the teams' 40-22 Super Bowl win over the Kansas City Chiefs, per a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AP mock NFL draft: Giants trade up to take Cam Ward No. 1 and Raiders move up for Shedeur Sanders
item.description: Cam Ward and Shedeur Sanders will be the first two quarterbacks selected in next month’s NFL draft. Where they go is still uncertain.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: One-of-a-kind card featuring jersey patch of Pirates star Paul Skenes is heading to auction
item.description: PITTBURGH (AP) — Paul Skenes has been in the major leagues for less than a year. A piece of the Pittsburgh Pirates ace — well, OK, a piece of the jersey that Skenes donned during his first start last May — could be ready to join some elite company.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Special Olympics Illinois athletes head to Italy for snowshoe races
item.description: On Wednesday, a team of Special Olympics Illinois snowshoe athletes boarded a plane to New York, with a final destination of Turin, Italy. There they will compete in the Special Olympics Winter World Games.
item.dc:creator: Erin McElroy, NewsNation

item.title: Jai Lucas announced as Miami's new coach. He'll take over for Jim Larrañaga with the Hurricanes
item.description: Jai Lucas and Miami have finalized the contract that makes him the school’s new men’s basketball coach, nearly two weeks after they struck preliminary agreement on a deal.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Raiders give pass rusher Maxx Crosby record-breaking extension
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — The Raiders not only extended the contract of star defensive end Maxx Crosby, they made him the highest-paid non quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Chris Collins shares special basketball bond with son Ryan at Northwestern
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Two hours before tipoff Monday at Welsh-Ryan Arena, Ryan Collins had the ball in his hands, showing off his shot, a similar scene to another coach’s son some four decades earlier. “He shows off before the game, just like I used to do,” said Northwestern head coach Chris Collins.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Highsmith goes from making the cut to a PGA Tour winner at the Cognizant Classic
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Joe Highsmith could feel himself crumbling under the pressure at the Cognizant Classic. This was on Friday, when the only thing at stake was making the cut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Soccer CIF Division III Final: San Diego 2, Mira Mesa 1
item.description: As the 7 seeded San Diego High School Cavers, are your 2025 CIFSDS Division III Champions, the final score 2-1
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, WGN 9
